    q_getAssetOut --> q_checkSolution: solution.length > 0
    q_checkSolution --> q_encodeSolution: solution.length > 0
    q_checkSolution --> q_approveDirectly: solution.length == 0

    q_checkBalance --> q_checkReceiver: assetOutBalance > 0
    q_checkBalance --> q_final: assetOutBalance == 0
    q_checkReceiver --> q_transfer: receiver != address(0)
    q_checkReceiver --> q_final: receiver == address(0)
    q_transfer --> q_final: safeTransfer(receiver, assetOutBalance)
    q_final --> [*]

    note right of q_approveDirectly
        INV-001: when no solution provided, contract pre-approves exact assetOut amount to auction
        INV-002: approval uses block.timestamp for price calculation (Dutch auction decay)
    end note

    note right of q_checkBalance
        INV-003: leftover assetOut balance after bid is forwarded to receiver if set

    q_iter --> q_return: i >= calls.length
    q_return --> [*]: return returnData

        INV-003: if any _call reverts, entire multiCall reverts (no partial execution returned)
